channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: ETL Pipeline: Fetching Real-Time News Data with Python and Postgres
item.description: The best way to actually understand data engineering is to build something that breaks, fix it, and watch it successfully run. In this article, we build an ETL pipeline that pulls data from the...

item.title: Trivya AI – Voice Assistant with Gemini Integration
item.description: This is a submission for the GitHub Finish-Up-A-Thon Challenge Project Description: Trivya AI is a Python-based voice assistant that combines speech recognition, text-to-speech, and Google Gemini...

item.title: Fable launches in late February after recent delay
item.description: Just a few days after pushing Fable out of 2026, Microsoft showed off more footage of Fable, the first new entry in the storied RPG franchise since 2010's Fable III, at its Xbox Games Showcase on...

item.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved arrives July 28th
item.description: As part of its Xbox Games Showcase on Sunday, Microsoft revealed new details about Halo: Campaign Evolved, the upcoming remake of Halo: Combat Evolved's campaign mode. The remake will debut on...

item.title: Code smell or not - useEffect with extra dependecies?
item.description: I recently came across a piece of React code that caught my attention (new project, new codebase and this pattern is used quite a lot). Imagine you have a table displaying a list of movies and you...

item.title: Gears of War: E-Day is no longer coming to the PS5
item.description: Apparently, the "return of Xbox" means a retreat from other platforms. At its Xbox Games Showcase today, Microsoft revealed that Gears of War: E-Day - which was previously announced for the Xbox,...

item.title: How OLED & LTPO Enable Always-On Displays
item.description: TL;DR: Always-on displays don’t drain your phone battery because they rely on two hardware advancements: OLED panels and LTPO technology. OLEDs save power by physically turning off pixels to...

item.title: Proliferate (YC S25) is hiring to building open source Codex
item.description: Article URL: https://www.ycombinator.com/companies/proliferate/jobs/L3copvK-founding-engineer Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48436669 Points: 0 # Comments: 0

item.title: Bringing Razorpay to InsForge: Building a Production-Grade Payment Flow
item.description: If you're building a SaaS in India, Stripe isn't always an option. Razorpay is the standard. A few days ago I noticed that InsForge — a Y Combinator-backed open-source framework — had solid Stripe...

item.title: The Verge Weekend Questionnaire
item.description: Have you ever wondered what the most indispensable app is for your favorite musician or how the world’s tech CEOs stay focused? Well, that’s the sort of thing we aim to uncover in our Verge...

item.title: The Most Important Technology You'll Ever Build
item.description: Developers spend their lives surrounded by incredible technology. We build distributed systems that span continents. We train AI models that can write code. We deploy applications to clouds...

item.title: The Hard Part of Programming Isn't What You'd Expect
item.description: As a university graduate in Artificial Intelligence, you would think at this point I am programming anything and everything, any side project I can think of from anywhere at anytime. The reality...

item.title: Add Sign in with ToroPass to Your Flutter App on Toronet
item.description: If you are building a Flutter app on Toronet, one of the hardest things to get right is identity. You need a way to: verify that a user really controls a Toro wallet request access to identity...

item.title: RPA Expense Approver — From Manual Checking to Automated Approval
item.description: This is a submission for the GitHub Finish-Up-A-Thon Challenge What I Built I built RPA Expense Approver, an automation project that helps process expense requests from a user-facing app. The main...

item.title: Xbox Games Showcase 2026: All the news and trailers
item.description: The console industry is in a weird place, and both Xbox and PlayStation have a chance to change the narrative a bit with their showcases at Summer Game Fest. Sony did that by focusing on the...

item.title: OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’
item.description: "Chat is dead" — at least, according to a senior OpenAI employee.

item.title: Govee’s all-weather smart lamp post is under $200 for the first time
item.description: If you have an outdoor space that needs some extra lighting, either for fun or security reasons (or a mix of the two), the Govee outdoor lamp post light is a good pick that’s 23 percent off its...

item.title: Japanese Gothic is a gorgeously grotesque ghost story
item.description: I'll give the usual caveat: The horror novel Japanese Gothic is best experienced going in with as little information as possible. Content warnings for graphic gore, scenes of domestic violence,...

item.title: The Virtual OS Museum lets you relive over 600 operating systems right on your desktop
item.description: The Virtual OS Museum isn't a physical place, it's a collection of over 1,700 distinct installations of over 600 operating systems for over 250 platforms that you can download and run via...

item.title: Dell’s new XPS 14 is better in almost every way
item.description: The 2026 XPS 14 is the best premium laptop we've seen from Dell in a while, with incredible build quality in a thin machine and good performance thanks to Intel's Core Ultra Series 3 "Panther...

item.title: Kill some time with these much needed distractions
item.description: Constantly being plugged into the news grind is mentally exhausting. Sometimes we just need to take a break, unwind, and do something fun. That’s why we’ve built up a collection of distracting...

item.title: Sponsors especially OPENAI CODEX voucher usage for codex - openAI challange
OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
item.description: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.

item.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
item.description: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.

item.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
item.description: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.

item.title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
item.description: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."

item.title: New ChatGPT Lockdown Mode Limits Tools That Could Enable Data Exfiltration
item.description: OpenAI has begun rolling out a new Lockdown Mode to ChatGPT for eligible personal accounts to reduce the risk of data exfiltration arising from prompt injection attacks. The feature is primarily...

item.title: Crypto-Funded Chinese Peptide Labs Are Booming
item.description: Plus: Hackers use Meta’s AI bots to hack Instagram accounts, Anthropic helps NSA hackers, a decades-long GPS satellite mystery may have been solved, and more.

item.title: Free Apps Are Quietly Turning Smart TVs Into Web-Scraping Proxies for AI
item.description: A researcher has reverse-engineered the iOS SDK that Bright Data embeds in consumer apps and documented how it turns devices, including always-on smart TVs, into exit nodes that relay web-scraping...

item.title: CISA Adds Actively Exploited SolarWinds Serv-U DoS Flaw to KEV Catalog
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has added a high-severity security flaw impacting SolarWinds Serv-U multi-protocol file server software to its Known Exploited...
